---
title: "News"
description: "All news and announcements from the Doss-Gollin Research Group."
listing:
    - id: all-news
      type: table
      contents:
          - "posts/*/*.qmd"
          - "posts/*/*.md"
      sort:
          - "date desc"
          - "title desc"
      sort-ui: false
      filter-ui: true
      table-striped: true
      table-hover: true
      page-size: 25
      categories: false
      fields: [date, title]
      field-display-names:
          date: Date
          title: Title
      feed: true
      date-format: iso
---

::: {#all-news}
:::
